name: Physical Intrusion + Cyber Follow-Up
description: Attack tree modelling a combined physical and cyber intrusion where physical access to a facility enables planting of implant devices, USB payloads, and direct network access
root_objective: Use physical facility access to establish persistent cyber access

nodes.title: Physical Intrusion Enabling Cyber Compromise
nodes.description: Gain physical access to a target facility to plant devices, connect to the network, or access systems directly

nodes.title: Gain Physical Entry to Facility
nodes.description: Bypass physical security controls to enter the target building

nodes.title: Tailgate Through Secure Door
nodes.description: Follow an authorised person through a badge-controlled door without using credentials

nodes.title: Clone RFID/HID Badge
nodes.description: Clone an employee's RFID access badge using a Proxmark or similar device from close proximity

nodes.title: Social Engineer Reception/Guard
nodes.description: Impersonate a contractor, vendor, or delivery person to gain escorted or unescorted access

nodes.title: Plant Network Implant Device
nodes.description: Install a covert hardware device for persistent remote access

nodes.title: Install LAN Turtle / Drop Box
nodes.description: Connect a small device to an open network port that provides reverse shell access over cellular or Wi-Fi

nodes.title: Install Rogue Wi-Fi AP
nodes.description: Hide a wireless access point connected to the corporate LAN for persistent remote access from the car park

nodes.title: Deploy USB Payloads
nodes.description: Use USB-based attack tools to compromise endpoints or exfiltrate data

nodes.title: Plant Rubber Ducky / BadUSB
nodes.description: Insert a keystroke injection device into an unlocked workstation to execute automated attack payload

nodes.title: Leave Trojanised USB in Common Area
nodes.description: Drop USB drives loaded with auto-running malware in the lobby, kitchen, or car park

nodes.title: Directly Access Sensitive Systems
nodes.description: Physically interact with servers, network equipment, or terminals

nodes.title: Access Unlocked Server Console
nodes.description: Find an unlocked server room and access a logged-in terminal or KVM console

nodes.title: Boot from Live USB
nodes.description: Reboot an unlocked workstation from a live USB to bypass disk encryption and extract data
